source: Engineering defaults pending corpus calibration. Functional weights follow root-motion strength (Meeùs/Schoenberg: descending-fifth strongest) and the cadential hierarchy; voice-leading weights reward parsimony (Cohn/Tymoczko). color_shift is reported but unweighted (a neutral tension axis, not a preference). Per-style corpus transition priors are the planned follow-on (ROADMAP gap 14).
